question: 青年失业率为空值的数据有多少条？

question: 查询全国层级且地区为北京的汇率数据

查询2021年能源CPI指数高于100且能源CPI同比涨幅为正的全国月份同比涨幅记录
ground_truth_sql:
SELECT c.year, c.month,
       ROUND(((c.energy_cpi_idx - p.energy_cpi_idx) * 100.0 / p.energy_cpi_idx), 3) AS yoy_change_pct
FROM cpi_inflation c
JOIN cpi_inflation p
ON c.geo_level = p.geo_level AND c.month = p.month AND c.year = p.year + 1
WHERE c.geo_level = 'national' AND c.year = 2021 AND c.energy_cpi_idx > 100.0
  AND ((c.energy_cpi_idx - p.energy_cpi_idx) * 100.0 / p.energy_cpi_idx) > 0
ORDER BY c.year, c.month

question: 2024年各统计层级中社零总额高于3000亿元的数据数量分别是多少？
ground_truth_sql:
WITH levels AS (
SELECT 'national' AS geo_level
UNION ALL SELECT 'region'
UNION ALL SELECT 'province'
UNION ALL SELECT 'city'
)
SELECT levels.geo_level, COALESCE(COUNT(r.geo_level), 0) AS count
FROM levels
LEFT JOIN retail_sales AS r
ON r.geo_level = levels.geo_level
AND r.year = 2024
AND r.total_sales_100m_cny > 3000
GROUP BY levels.geo_level
ORDER BY CASE levels.geo_level
WHEN 'national' THEN 1
WHEN 'region' THEN 2
WHEN 'province' THEN 3
WHEN 'city' THEN 4
END

SELECT year, AVG(mining_index) AS avg_index
FROM industrial_output
WHERE geo_name = '华南' AND year BETWEEN 2018 AND 2024
GROUP BY year
ORDER BY year

question: 2017年至2025年，全国层级每年的出口额合计是多少？

question: 按年份和季度统计，2023年至2024年美元兑人民币汇率的平均值
ground_truth_sql:
SELECT year,
       CASE
         WHEN month BETWEEN 1 AND 3 THEN 1
         WHEN month BETWEEN 4 AND 6 THEN 2
         WHEN month BETWEEN 7 AND 9 THEN 3
         ELSE 4
       END AS quarter,
       AVG(usd_cny) AS avg_usd_cny
FROM exchange_rates
WHERE year BETWEEN 2023 AND 2024
GROUP BY year, quarter
ORDER BY year, quarter
